---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new lab scenario, integration, or documentation improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: keyurp7
---

## Summary
A brief description of what you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve or what value does it add?

## Proposed Approach
If you have ideas on how this could be implemented or documented, describe them here.

## Relevant Context
- Related IAM platforms or technologies
- Links to relevant documentation or standards
- How this relates to existing lab content

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.
